creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Dear submitter, 

It looks like that your patch is actually incorrect, 
unfortunately since the code seems to use VIAAHCI as 
a determinstic value not a bitwise one.  Is the unpatched 
-CURRENT still having the same problem?  We may need some 
alternative fix that I wish to figure out if you would 
provide some help, thanks in advance!
